column1: # missions.tsv — DESIRED set of orchestrators (Layer 4). One row = one mission = one orchestrator.
# Tab-separated. Lines starting with # are ignored. fleet-loop.sh launches an orchestrator per row.
# Columns:  mission  orchestrator  repo  intent  done_when
#   mission       short kebab id (also the herdr name + goals/<mission>.md)
#   orchestrator  claude | codex | cursor  (which agent drives this mission's herd)
#   repo          absolute path to the mission's git repo
#   intent        one-line WHAT (the orchestrator turns this into a spec)
#   done_when     the /goal condition — what "delivered" means (verifiable, one line)

column5: OAuth login works end-to-end on staging and tests pass
billing dashboard renders real data and vitest is green
